description: Environment setup - install dependencies, generate Prisma client, and verify existing build passes before making any changes.
steps: Run npx prisma generate to generate the Prisma client
Run npx prisma db push to ensure the database schema is up-to-date
Run npm run build to confirm the baseline builds cleanly with no errors
acceptance_criteria: npx prisma generate completes without errors
npm run build completes with exit code 0
verification: npm run build exits with code 0
findings: All environment setup steps passed cleanly. npm install added 697 packages. Prisma generate produced client v7.8.0. prisma db push created dev.db and synced schema. npm run build (Next.js 16.2.6 Turbopack) compiled successfully with no TypeScript errors, generating 30 static pages. 5 moderate npm audit vulnerabilities present but non-blocking.
